channel.title: NUZU News
channel.description: NUZU: Real News in Real Time. Breaking headlines from 200+ trusted sources.

EXCLUSIVE: Cable may be dying but ‘The Cable Guy’ lives on — on streaming. Hulu has ordered a comedy pilot inspired by the Jim Carrey movie, with Jake Johnson and Damon Wayans Jr. attached to star and executive produce. The pilot reunites Johnson - facebook.com
